notifyPastDue.description: Notify on past due items at startup
notifyPastDue.tooltip: If unchecked, tasks/events that expired while the applet was not running will be automatically dismissed on startup

respectValarm.description: Respect VALARM reminders in calendar events
respectValarm.tooltip: If checked, calendar event reminders (VALARM) will trigger notifications at their specified times

enableCountdownReminders.description: Enable T-15 and T-5 countdown reminders
enableCountdownReminders.tooltip: If checked, tasks and events show T-15 and T-5 toggle buttons for pre-event notifications

allDayReminderHour.tooltip: Hour (0-23) to notify about all-day calendar events

allDayReminderMinute.tooltip: Minute (0-59) to notify about all-day calendar events

enableSound.description: Play sound when a reminder fires

soundFile.tooltip: Select an audio file (.wav, .ogg, .mp3) to play when a reminder fires

previewSound.tooltip: Play the selected sound file now

browserCommand.tooltip: e.g. firefox %u or /usr/bin/chromium %u (leave blank for system default)

discoverCalendars.tooltip: Fetch available calendars from Nextcloud (must be connected first)

syncNow.tooltip: Fetch today's events from enabled calendars immediately

caldavCalendars.tooltip: Toggle which calendars to sync events from
